title: Trichogonia phlebodes
taxonomy: Trichogonia phlebodes is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. It is native to South America. The classification of Trichogonia phlebodes places it within the genus Trichogonia, which is part of the subtribe Oncidiinae. The subtribe Oncidiinae is a group of orchids that are characterized by their unique flower structures and growth habits.
